title: State General Fund Revenue Estimates for FY 2022 and FY 2023

events.description: State General Fund Revenue Estimates for FY 2022 and FY 2023 released
Consensus Revenue Estimating Group to adjust estimates prior to the conclusion of the 2022 Legislative Session

evidence.quote: The overall estimate for FY 2022 was increased by $1.308 billion.
Of this amount, the estimate for total taxes was increased by $1.298 billion, while the estimate for other revenues was increased by $10.1 million.
Forecasted receipts, which were up $30.1 million relative to estimates through October 2021, were increased relative to the previous FY 2022 forecast by $94.5 million.
The newly revised estimate reflects growth of 26.0 percent over FY 2021 actual receipts, and the FY 2023 estimate forecasts further growth of 7.9 percent.
